title: New Vanilla
description: New Vanilla aims to create the best experience I could make while keeping the vanilla feeling by not adding, but expanding
body:
# Steam Deck and Mobile Phone Support now available!!!
### Notes:
- The preset meant for Steam Deck is the "Low" preset
- Mobile support is still in beta (since I dont know much about the java on mobile scene, and thus, dont know what the community prefences)
- Mobile support is mainly meant for [Zalith Launcher](https://zalithlauncher.com/) (Link for transparency: https://zalithlauncher.com). As in; the instance was only tested and created on zalith launcher, and  the instructions only reference Zalith Launcher's UI.
- Mobile support *might* work on other mobile launchers (i.e pojav launcher) but no garuntee, I *am* however open to working with people who know more about other mobile launchers
- iPhone support will never happen (at least not by me, your free to see if it works and fix anything that breaks) since I don't really like apple, and I think I lost my iPhone 11 anyways
# You ever feel like some modpacks dont feel vanilla enough? Well I did, so i created this!

**Tired of "vanilla" (no offence) modpacks adding new blocks, mobs, items, (and more :P) that feels like it changes too much? this does do that! what it *does* add, are game mechanics, and revamped visuals and sounds!** 

Think of something (other than new blocks, items, and mobs), have you thought of it? well it has been updated; World gen, movement, controls, inventory, sound, graphics, ***EVERYTHING***


now what does that entail? _Welllll....._

## Game mechanics!
Pretty much all of them come from other minecraft games to keep the vanilla feel (I didn't take any from legends since I have barely played it :/) 

<details>
  
<summary>Examples? Sure!</summary>

**Powerful mobs!** (enchanted mobs in dungeons, mob captains here)
They are quite hard to beat, but the rewards are *so* worth it


**Rolling!**\
(also in dungeons lol) 
It's very useful when escaping monsters (especially with creepers :3)


**New camera system!**\
The camera now tilts with movement (like Quake) and the third person camera now acts independently of your character! So you can finally stop staring at the back of your head :3


**Scrollable offhand**\
and dedicated tool, elytra, and dynamic lighting slots, *and* inventory sorting! (so basically a mini inventory update :3)


**Voice/Proximity Chat!**\
So you can now talk to your friends without needing something like discord ~~And also hit your (ex)freinds down a ravine and hear their scream fade~~


**1000+ new advancements!**\
So you *always* have something to work to!


**A world and mini map**\
(from the 3DS version of all places :P)
to mark your exporation progress and never get lost (you can even teleport to places if you have cheats on)


**Flight controls for elytra!**\
Rolling, yawing, and pitching!


**Proper VR support**\
(It was a bit weird on launch, sorry)


**Complete controller support**\
Supporting:\
**Xbox controllers**
(All of them that support PC since they all have the same features, also most generic controllers too since most of them have the same features as the xbox controllers)

**Nintendo Switch Joycons**\
and\
**Pro controllers**

**PS4**\
(Dual shock 4) controllers (sure it will work with Dualsense controllers too. Tested with a Gamesir G8+ since I don't have a playstation controller)

***Steam* controllers**\
(Steam deck will come in a later update once i actually get mine :/)

and even **Touch controls!**\ 

## Visuals!
<details>
<summary>Not the vibrant kind, but close to it X3</summary>
**Fine tuned shaders**\
I tried my very best to make it look like vanilla, but with more graphical features! (shadows, reflections, light rays, etc)

**Revamped textures!**\
None of the textures have been changed (execpt the confusing ones i.e enchanted books, potions, banner patterns, etc) nut they *do* have new features! Connectivity, PBR, vaired textures, eating animations, mob variants, 3d skins and armour, and a lot of gui and ui changes!

**Much better animations!**\

(I always disliked the vanilla ones :/)
The old ones really didn't have much character or detail (and also some ones ported from bedrock)

**New visual indicators**\
like more detailed hearts and armour bar, and a fire hud that doesn't take up half the screen

**514 defualt chunk render distance!**\
2 chunks actual render distance, and 512 LOD distant horizons render distance on low setting. I think that is how it works anyways
</details>

<details>
<summary>Wait, what about sounds?</summary>
Basically; new everything!

**New block sounds**
  
**New item sounds**

**New ambient sounds**

**New sounds for a lot of items**\
(that can be played when selecting the item in the 
inventory or hotbar

**Chat pings**\
(like in discord)

And sound physics!

Overall, much more Immersive!

</details>


This (along with the screenshots) were made and tested on a TUF gaming F15

<details>
  
<summary>Specs</summary>

**CPU:**\ 12th Gen Intel® Core™ i7-12700H Processor 2.3 GHz (24M Cache, up to 4.7 GHz, 14 cores: 6 P-cores and 8 E-cores)

**GPU(s):**\ NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 4060 Laptop GPU, 8GB vram, 2420MHz (2370MHz Boost Clock)/ Intel(R) Iris(R) Xe graphics, 128MB vram, ~400MHz (1450MHz Boost Clock)

**Ram:**\ 32GB (usually only takes up 4-6GB of ram)
</details>

I *am* trying to make a version for android (via pojav/zalith launcher) but I do not have one yet

I would like help, but you need to ask me first

PLEASE dedicate at leat 4-6 GB of RAM


### Credit:
[xKingDark](https://bsky.app/profile/xkingdark.poggy.org) for the logo
